questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 哪种 AWS 服务或工具提供历史 AWS 支出模式的可视化和未来 AWS 成本的预测？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or tool provides a visualization of historical AWS spending patterns and projections of future AWS costs?

A.zh: AWS 成本与使用报告
A.en: AWS Cost and Usage Report

B.zh: AWS Budgets
B.en: AWS Budgets

C.zh: 成本管理器
C.en: Cost Explorer

D.zh: Amazon CloudWatch
D.en: Amazon Cloud Watch

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 成本与使用报告提供详细的成本和使用数据报告，适合深入分析，但它不提供可视化功能或未来成本预测，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service provides detailed cost and usage data reporting, which is suitable for in-depth analysis, but it does not provide visualization capabilities or future cost projections, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Budgets 允许用户设置预算和监控成本，但它主要用于预算管理和警报通知，而不是用于历史支出可视化或未来成本预测，因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: allows users to set budgets and monitor costs, but it is primarily used for budget management and alert notifications, not for historical spend visualization or future cost forecasting, so this option is.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：成本管理器 是 AWS 提供的工具，用于可视化历史支出模式并预测未来成本。完全符合题目要求，所以该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a tool provided by AWS for visualizing historical spending patterns and predicting future costs. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CloudWatch 用于监控资源指标、日志和警报，不提供 AWS 历史支出模式和未来成本预测的专用可视化。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon CloudWatch is used to monitor resource metrics, logs, and alerts and does not provide dedicated visualization of AWS's historical spending patterns and future cost projections.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：成本管理器 是 AWS 提供的工具，用于可视化历史支出模式并预测未来成本。完全符合题目要求，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a tool provided by AWS for visualizing historical spending patterns and predicting future costs. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在迁移到 AWS 云，而不是在本地运行其基础设施。此迁移有下列哪些优点？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: A company is migrating to the AWS Cloud instead of running its infrastructure on premises. Which of the following are advantages of this migration? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 消除运行安全审核的需要
A.en: Elimination of the need to perform security auditing

B.zh: 提高全球影响力和敏捷性
B.en: Increased global reach and agility

C.zh: 能够在几分钟内进行全球部署
C.en: Ability to deploy globally in minutes

D.zh: 消除 IT 员工成本
D.en: Elimination of the cost of IT staff members

E.zh: 所有计算服务缺省冗余
E.en: Redundancy by default for all compute services

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：迁移到 AWS 不会消除安全审计责任；客户仍须根据责任共担模式审核自身的应用程序、配置和数据。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Moving to AWS does not eliminate security auditing; customers must still audit their applications, configurations, and data under the shared responsibility model.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 在全球拥有多个区域和可用区，使客户能够快速扩展到全球市场，同时利用云服务的灵活性来调整资源以满足需求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS has multiple regions and availability zones around the world, allowing customers to quickly expand to global markets while leveraging the flexibility of cloud services to adjust resources to meet demand.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 的全球基础设施可让客户通过 CloudFormation 等自动化工具和服务在几分钟内快速将资源部署到多个区域。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS's global infrastructure allows customers to quickly deploy resources to multiple regions in minutes through automated tools and services such as CloudFormation.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然迁移到AWS可以降低一些IT运维成本，但仍需要IT人员来管理云资源、优化架构和确保安全。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While moving to AWS can reduce some IT operating costs, IT staff is still needed to manage cloud resources, optimize architecture, and ensure security.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：尽管 AWS 提供高可用性和冗余选项，但并非所有计算服务缺省都是冗余的。客户需要根据自己的需求配置冗余架构。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AWS provides high availability and redundancy options, not all computing services are redundant by default. Customers need to configure a redundant architecture according to their needs.

answer_text.zh: B. 提高全球影响力和敏捷性；C. 能够在几分钟内进行全球部署
answer_text.en: B. Increased global reach and agility; C. Ability to deploy globally in minutes

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BC (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 在全球拥有多个区域和可用区，使客户能够快速扩展到全球市场，同时利用云服务的灵活性来调整资源以满足需求。；AWS 的全球基础设施可让客户通过 CloudFormation 等自动化工具和服务在几分钟内快速将资源部署到多个区域。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS has multiple regions and availability zones around the world, allowing customers to quickly expand to global markets while leveraging the flexibility of cloud services to adjust resources to meet demand.; AWS's global infrastructure allows customers to quickly deploy resources to multiple regions in minutes through automated tools and services such as CloudFormation.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务使用边缘网站来缓存内容？
question_text.en: Which AWS service uses edge locations to cache content?

A.zh: Amazon Kinesis
A.en: Amazon Kinesis

B.zh: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
B.en: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)

C.zh: Amazon CloudFront
C.en: Amazon CloudFront

D.zh: Amazon Route 53
D.en: Amazon Route 53

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Kinesis 是一项用于实时数据流处理、边缘位置和内容缓存无关的服务。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Kinesis is a service for real-time data stream processing, edge location and content caching agnostic.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon SQS 是一种消息队列服务，可独立于边缘位置和内容缓存分离和管理消息传递。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SQS is a message queuing service that decouples and manages messaging independent of edge locations and content caching.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon CloudFront 是 AWS 提供的内容交付网络 (CDN) 服务，它使用边缘位置缓存内容以加速交付。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service from AWS that uses edge locations to cache content to accelerate delivery.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Route 53 是 AWS 的域名系统 (DNS) 服务，虽然边缘网站可用于提高 DNS 查询的性能，但它不用于缓存内容。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Route 53 is AWS's Domain Name System (DNS) service, and while edge locations can be used to improve the performance of DNS queries, it is not used to cache content.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon CloudFront 是 AWS 提供的内容交付网络 (CDN) 服务，它使用边缘位置缓存内容以加速交付。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service from AWS that uses edge locations to cache content to accelerate delivery.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在不访问 Internet 的情况下从 Amazon EC2 实例安全地访问 Amazon S3 存储桶。公司应该用什么来达成这个目标？
question_text.en: A company wants to securely access an Amazon S3 bucket from an Amazon EC2 instance without accessing the internet. What should the company use to accomplish this goal?

A.zh: VPN 连接
A.en: VPN connection

B.zh: 互联网网关
B.en: Internet gateway

C.zh: VPC 终端节点
C.en: VPC endpoint

D.zh: NAT 网关
D.en: NAT gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：VPN 连接用于在本地数据和 AWS 之间创建安全通信信道。它与此问题所要求的访问 AWS 中的 S3 无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The VPN connection is used to establish a secure communication channel between local data and AWS. It has nothing to do with accessing S3 within AWS as required by this question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Internet网关用来让VPC内的资源访问Internet，但这题明确要求S3不能通过Internet访问。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Internet Gateway is used to allow resources in the VPC to access the Internet, but this question clearly requires that S3 not be accessed through the Internet.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：VPC Endpoint 允许通过 VPC 内的私有网络直接访问 AWS 服务（例如 S3），无需经过 Internet，完全满足问题要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: VPC Endpoint allows direct access to AWS services (such as S3) through a private network within a VPC without going through the Internet, which fully meets the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：NAT网关用于允许私有子网中的资源访问Internet，但本题要求不通过Internet访问S3。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: NAT Gateway is used to allow resources in a private subnet to access the Internet, but this question requires not accessing S3 through the Internet.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：VPC Endpoint 允许通过 VPC 内的私有网络直接访问 AWS 服务（例如 S3），无需经过 Internet，完全满足问题要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: VPC Endpoint allows direct access to AWS services (such as S3) through a private network within a VPC without going through the Internet, which fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要一项可以在 Amazon EC2 实例和本地实例中自动部署软件的 AWS 服务。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants an AWS service that can automate software deployment in Amazon EC2 instances and on-premises instances. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS CodeCommit
A.en: AWS CodeCommit

B.zh: AWS CodeBuild
B.en: AWS CodeBuild

C.zh: AWS CodeDeploy
C.en: AWS CodeDeploy

D.zh: AWS CodePipeline
D.en: AWS CodePipeline

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CodeCommit 是一项用于代码存储和版本控制的托管源代码控制服务，但它不负责软件开发。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS CodeCommit is a managed source code control service for code storage and version control, but it is not responsible for software development.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CodeBuild 是一项构建服务，用于编译代码、运行测试和产生软件包，但它不负责部署软件。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS CodeBuild is a build service that compiles code, runs tests, and generates software packages, but it is not responsible for deploying the software.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS CodeDeploy 是一项部署服务，可自动将软件部署到 Amazon EC2 实例、Lambda 函数和本地服务器，满足问题要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS CodeDeploy is a deployment service that can automate software deployment to Amazon EC2 instances, Lambda functions, and local servers, meeting the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CodePipeline 是一项用于自动化构建、测试和部署工作流程的持续交付服务，但它本身并不是专门为运行部署而设计的服务。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS CodePipeline is a continuous delivery service for automating build, test, and deployment workflows, but it is not itself a service specifically designed to execute deployment.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS CodeDeploy 是一项部署服务，可自动将软件部署到 Amazon EC2 实例、Lambda 函数和本地服务器，满足问题要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS CodeDeploy is a deployment service that can automate software deployment to Amazon EC2 instances, Lambda functions, and local servers, meeting the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服务是无服务器的？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which AWS services are serverless? (Choose two.)

A.zh: AWS Fargate
A.en: AWS Fargate

B.zh: Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka
B.en: Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka

C.zh: Amazon EMR
C.en: Amazon EMR

D.zh: Amazon S3
D.en: Amazon S3

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：虽然 AWS Fargate 可用于运行容器化应用程序，但它并不完全是无服务器服务，因为它仍然需要用户定义的容器配置和任务。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Although AWS Fargate can be used to run containerized applications, it is not entirely a serverless service because it still requires user-defined container configurations and tasks.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon MSK 是一项托管 Kafka 服务，但它并非完全无服务器，因为用户需要管理集群配置和容量。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon MSK is a managed Kafka service, but it is not completely serverless because users need to manage cluster configuration and capacity.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EMR 是一项托管 Hadoop 桶架服务。用户需要管理集群节点，因此不是Serverless服务。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon EMR is a managed Hadoop bucket rack service. Users need to manage cluster nodes, so it is not a Serverless service.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon S3 是一项无服务器服务。用户无需管理底层服务器，支持数据按需存储和访问。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon S3 is a Serverless service. Users do not need to manage the underlying server and support data storage and access on demand.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EC2 是一种虚拟服务器服务，用户需要管理实例，因此它不是无服务器服务。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon EC2 is a virtual server service and users need to manage instances, so it is not a Serverless service.

answer_text.en: A. AWS Fargate; D. Amazon S3

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AD (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：虽然 AWS Fargate 可用于运行容器化应用程序，但它并不完全是无服务器服务，因为它仍然需要用户定义的容器配置和任务。；Amazon S3 是一项无服务器服务。用户无需管理底层服务器，支持数据按需存储和访问。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Although AWS Fargate can be used to run containerized applications, it is not entirely a serverless service because it still requires user-defined container configurations and tasks.; This option is described as follows: Amazon S3 is a Serverless service. Users do not need to manage the underlying server and support data storage and access on demand.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 公司希望不断改进流程和进程以交付业务价值。这个目标代表了 AWS Well-Architected Framework的哪一个支柱？
question_text.en: A company wants to continuously improve processes and procedures to deliver business value. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework does this goal represent?

A.zh: 性能效率
A.en: Performance efficiency

B.zh: 卓越运营
B.en: Operational excellence

C.zh: 可靠性
C.en: Reliability

D.zh: 可持续性
D.en: Sustainability

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：性能效率支柱重点在于如何有效地使用计算资源来满足系统需求。它与持续流程改善和交付业务价值的目标没有直接关系，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The performance efficiency pillar focuses on how efficiently computing resources are used to meet system demands. It is not directly related to the goals of continuous process improvement and delivery of business value, so this option is.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：卓越运营支柱强调持续改进流程和程序，以优化运营并交付业务价值，符合题目描述。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: At the heart of the operational excellence pillar is the continuous improvement of processes and procedures to optimize operations and deliver business value. This is completely consistent with the goal described in the question, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可靠性支柱着重于系统从故障状态中恢复并正常运行的能力。虽然可靠性很重要，但它与持续的流程改善和业务价值的交付没有直接关系，因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The reliability pillar focuses on the system's ability to recover from fault conditions and operate normally. While reliability is important, it is not directly related to continuous process improvement and delivery of business value, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可持续性支柱的重点是减少云计算对环境的影响。虽然这是一个重要的目标，但它与问题中描述的目标没有直接关系，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The sustainability pillar focuses on reducing the environmental impact of cloud computing. Although this is an important goal, it is not directly related to the goal described in the question, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：卓越运营支柱强调持续改进流程和程序，以优化运营并交付业务价值，符合题目描述。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: At the heart of the operational excellence pillar is the continuous improvement of processes and procedures to optimize operations and deliver business value. This is completely consistent with the goal described in the question, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 根据 AWS 责任共担模式，下列何者是客户责任？
question_text.en: Which of the following is a customer responsibility according to the AWS shared responsibility model?

A.zh: 为 Amazon S3 基础设施设备套用安全修补程序。
A.en: Apply security patches for Amazon S3 infrastructure devices.

B.zh: 为 AWS 数据中心提供物理安全。
B.en: Provide physical security for AWS datacenters.

C.zh: 在 Lambda@Edge 上安装操作系统更新。
C.en: Install operating system updates on Lambda@Edge.

D.zh: 为 IAM 用户账户实施多重身份验证 (MFA)。
D.en: Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) for IAM user accounts.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 的基础设施设备由 AWS 负责，客户无需为 AWS 托管的基础设施设备套用安全修补程序。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3's infrastructure devices are the responsibility of AWS, and customers are not required to apply security patches for AWS-managed infrastructure devices.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：管理安全是 AWS 的责任，客户无需为 AWS 数据中心提供管理安全。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Management security is the responsibility of AWS, and customers are not required to provide management security for AWS data centers.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Lambda@Edge 是一项完全托管的服务。 AWS 负责更新底层操作系统，客户无需管理操作系统。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Lambda@Edge is a fully managed service. AWS is responsible for updating the underlying operating system, and customers do not need to manage the operating system.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：客户负责配置和保护其 IAM 身份，包括为 IAM 用户启用多重身份验证以降低凭证外泄的风险。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Customers are responsible for configuring and protecting their IAM identities, including enabling multi-factor authentication for IAM users to reduce the risk of credential compromise.

answer_text.zh: D. 为 IAM 用户账户实施多重身份验证 (MFA)。
answer_text.en: D. Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) for IAM user accounts.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：来源未提供投票比例。热门讨论与考点摘要：客户负责配置和保护其 IAM 身份，包括为 IAM 用户启用多重身份验证以降低凭证外泄的风险。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: the source did not provide vote percentages. Popular discussion and key point summary: Under the shared responsibility model, the customer protects IAM identities, including enabling MFA for IAM users, while AWS protects the underlying infrastructure.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司应使用哪一种 AWS 服务来组织、表征和搜索大量图像？
question_text.en: Which AWS service should a company use to organize, characterize, and search large numbers of images?

A.zh: Amazon Transcribe
A.en: Amazon Transcribe

B.zh: Amazon Rekognition
B.en: Amazon Rekognition

C.zh: Amazon Aurora
C.en: Amazon Aurora

D.zh: Amazon QuickSight
D.en: Amazon QuickSight

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Transcribe 是一种将音频文件转换为文本的语音到文Amazon Transcribe。它不适用于图像组织、分类和搜索，因此此选项适用。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a speech-to-text service that converts audio files to text. It does not apply to image organization, classification, and searching, so this option is.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Rekognition 是一种图像和视频分析服务，可识别对象、场景、人脸，并支持图像的分类和搜索。该选项符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is an image and video analysis service that recognizes objects, scenes, faces, and supports classification and search of images. This option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是一种关系数据库服务，主要用于存储和管理结构化数据，而不是图像处理，因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a relational database service designed primarily for storing and managing structured data, not image processing, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon QuickSight 是一项用于数据可视化和分析的商业智能服务，与图像处理无关，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a business intelligence service for data visualization and analysis and has nothing to do with image processing, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Rekognition 是一种图像和视频分析服务，可识别对象、场景、人脸，并支持图像的分类和搜索。该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is an image and video analysis service that recognizes objects, scenes, faces, and supports classification and search of images. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一项 AWS 服务总是免费提供给用户？
question_text.en: Which AWS service is always available free of charge to users?

A.zh: Amazon Athena
A.en: Amazon Athena

B.zh: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
B.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

C.zh: AWS Secrets Manager
C.en: AWS Secrets Manager

D.zh: Amazon ElastiCache
D.en: Amazon ElastiCache

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Athena 是一项交互式查询服务，用于分析 Amazon S3 中存储的数据。它按查询收费，因此并不总是免费服务。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an interactive query service for analyzing data stored in Amazon S3. It is charged per query, so it is not always a free service.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：IAM 是 AWS 的身份和访问管理服务，用于管理用户、群组和权限。无论账户使用情况如何，IAM 始终对用户免费。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: IAM is AWS's identity and access management service for managing users, groups, and permissions. IAM is always free to users, regardless of account usage.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Secrets Manager 是一项用于管理和轮换机密的服务。这是一项按使用付费的服务，因此并非总是免费的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a service for managing and rotating secrets. It is a pay-per-use service, so it is not always free.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon ElastiCache 是一种内存缓存服务，用于加速应用程序性能。这是一项按使用付费的服务，因此并非总是免费的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an in-memory caching service used to accelerate application performance. It is a pay-per-use service, so it is not always free.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
answer_text.en: B. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：IAM 是 AWS 的身份和访问管理服务，用于管理用户、群组和权限。无论账户使用情况如何，IAM 始终对用户免费。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM is AWS's identity and access management service for managing users, groups, and permissions. IAM is always free to users, regardless of account usage.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在本地运行部分工作负载以遵守监管准则。该公司希望使用 AWS 云来运行不需要在本地运行的工作负载。该公司还希望能够对本地工作负载和云工作负载使用相同的 API 调用。公司应该使用哪种 AWS 服务或功能来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to run some of its workloads on premises to comply with regulatory guidelines. The company wants to use the AWS Cloud to run workloads that are not required to be on premises. The company also wants to be able to use the same API calls for the on-premises workloads and the cloud workloads. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 专用主机
A.en: Dedicated Hosts

B.zh: AWS Outposts
B.en: AWS Outposts

C.zh: 可用区
C.en: Availability Zones

D.zh: AWS Wavelength
D.en: AWS Wavelength

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：专用主机是一种用于在AWS云提供物理服务器的服务，主要是为了满足合规性或授权要求，但它不能用于在本地运行工作负载，因此不满足问题要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Dedicated Hosts is a service used to provide physical servers in the AWS cloud, mainly to meet compliance or licensing requirements, but it cannot be used to run workloads locally and therefore does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Outposts 是一种混合云解决方案，可让用户在本地上运行 AWS 服务，同时保持与 AWS 云的 API 调用一致。这完全符合标题的要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts is a hybrid cloud solution that allows users to run AWS services locally while maintaining consistent API calls with the AWS cloud. This fully meets the requirements of the title.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可用区是AWS云中用于高可用性架构设计的数据中心区域，但它们不能用于本地运行工作负载，因此不符合问题要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Availability Zones are data center areas in the AWS cloud that are used for high-availability architecture design, but they cannot be used to run workloads locally, so they do not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Wavelength 是一项用于在边缘网络上运行工作负载的服务。主要用于低延迟的应用场景。但它不支持本地运行工作负载，因此不满足问题要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Wavelength is a service for running workloads on edge networks. It is mainly used in low-latency application scenarios. However, it does not support running workloads locally, so it does not meet the question requirements.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Outposts 是一种混合云解决方案，可让用户在本地上运行 AWS 服务，同时保持与 AWS 云的 API 调用一致。这完全符合标题的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts is a hybrid cloud solution that allows users to run AWS services locally while maintaining consistent API calls with the AWS cloud. This fully meets the requirements of the title.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: Amazon EC2 按需型实例的建议使用案例为何？
question_text.en: What is the recommended use case for Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances?

A.zh: 需要长时间使用特定 EC2 实例配置的稳态工作负载
A.en: A steady-state workload that requires a particular EC2 instance configuration for a long period of time

B.zh: 对于需要最低成本的项目，可以中断的工作负载
B.en: A workload that can be interrupted for a project that requires the lowest possible cost

C.zh: 不可预测的工作负载，不需要长期承诺
C.en: An unpredictable workload that does not require a long-term commitment

D.zh: 预计运转时间超过 1 年的工作负载
D.en: A workload that is expected to run for longer than 1 year

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：对于稳定的长期工作负载，建议使用预留实例，因为它比按需型实例具有更低的成本和长期承诺优势。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: For stable long-term workloads, Reserved Instances are recommended as it offers lower cost and long-term commitment advantages over On-Demand Instances.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：对于可以中断的工作负载，建议使用 竞价型实例而不是按需型实例，因为它们的成本最低。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: For workloads that can be interrupted, Spot Instances are recommended over On-Demand Instances because they are the lowest cost.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：按需型实例的主要特点是能够灵活应对不可预测的工作负载，而无需长期承诺。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The main feature of On-Demand Instances is flexibility for unpredictable workloads without the need for long-term commitments.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：对于预计运行超过 1 年的工作负载，建议使用预留实例，因为它们更经济。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: For workloads expected to run for more than 1 year, Reserved Instances are recommended as they are more economical.

answer_text.zh: C. 不可预测的工作负载，不需要长期承诺
answer_text.en: C. An unpredictable workload that does not require a long-term commitment

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：按需型实例的主要特点是能够灵活应对不可预测的工作负载，而无需长期承诺。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The main feature of On-Demand Instances is flexibility for unpredictable workloads without the need for long-term commitments.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用 AWS 网络解决方案来充当多个 VPC 和本地网络之间的集中式网关。哪些 AWS 服务或功能可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to use an AWS networking solution that can act as a centralized gateway between multiple VPCs and on- premises networks. Which AWS service or feature will meet this requirement?

A.zh: 网关 VPC 终端节点
A.en: Gateway VPC endpoint

B.zh: AWS Direct Connect
B.en: AWS Direct Connect

C.zh: AWS Transit Gateway
C.en: AWS Transit Gateway

D.zh: AWS PrivateLink
D.en: AWS PrivateLink

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项 用于 VPC 内到 AWS 服务（例如 S3 和 DynamoDB）的私人连接。它无法充当多个 VPC 和本地网络之间的集中式网关，因此此选项是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is used for private connections within a VPC to AWS services such as S3 and DynamoDB. It cannot act as a centralized gateway between multiple VPCs and on-premises networks, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Direct Connect 是一种专用网络连接服务，用于将本地数据中心与 AWS 连接。虽然它可以连接到本地网络，但它不能充当多个 VPC 之间的集中式网关，因此此选项是错误的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a private network connection service used to connect on-premises data centers with AWS. While it can connect to local networks, it cannot act as a centralized gateway between multiple VPCs, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Transit Gateway 是一种集中式网关服务，可连接多个 VPC 和本地网络。它支持跨区域、跨账户的网络连接，是满足问题需求的正确选择。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a centralized gateway service that can connect multiple VPCs and on-premises networks. It supports cross-region and cross-account network connections and is the right option to meet the needs of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS PrivateLink 用于在 VPC 之间或 VPC 与本地网络之间创建私有连接，但其主要用途是访问特定服务，而不是充当集中式网关。因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is used to establish private connections between VPCs or between a VPC and an on-premises network, but its primary use is to access specific services rather than acting as a centralized gateway. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Transit Gateway 是一种集中式网关服务，可连接多个 VPC 和本地网络。它支持跨区域、跨账户的网络连接，是满足问题需求的正确选择。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a centralized gateway service that can connect multiple VPCs and on-premises networks. It supports cross-region and cross-account network connections and is the right option to meet the needs of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 管理员发现昨天删除了多个 AWS 资源。哪种 AWS 服务可以协助确定原因并确定哪个用户删除了资源？
question_text.en: An administrator observed that multiple AWS resources were deleted yesterday. Which AWS service will help identify the cause and determine which user deleted the resources?

A.zh: AWS CloudTrail
A.en: AWS CloudTrail

B.zh: Amazon Inspector
B.en: Amazon Inspector

C.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
C.en: Amazon GuardDuty

D.zh: AWS Trusted Advisor
D.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS CloudTrail 是一项记录用户和服务的 API 调用历史记录的服务。它可以帮助管理员查看谁创建、修改或删除了资源。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS CloudTrail is a service that records the history of API calls by users and services. It helps administrators see who has created, modified, or deleted resources.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Inspector 是一项自动化安全评估服务，用于检查应用程序是否有安全漏洞和合规性问题，而不是追踪资源删除。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Inspector is an automated security assessment service that examines applications for security vulnerabilities and compliance issues rather than tracking resource deletions.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一项威胁检测服务，可识别潜在的恶意活动或未经授权的行为，但它不会记录资源删除。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service that identifies potentially malicious activity or unauthorized behavior, but it does not log resource deletions.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Trusted Advisor 是一项优化建议服务，提供成本优化、安全性、性能和容错建议，但它不会记录用户活动或资源删除操作。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Trusted Advisor is an optimization recommendation service that provides cost optimization, security, performance, and fault tolerance recommendations, but it does not log user activity or resource deletion operations.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS CloudTrail 是一项记录用户和服务的 API 调用历史记录的服务。它可以帮助管理员查看谁创建、修改或删除了资源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS CloudTrail is a service that records the history of API calls by users and services. It helps administrators see who has created, modified, or deleted resources.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 为了帮助公司在云实现支付卡产业数据安全标准 (PCI DSS) 合规性，AWS 提供：
question_text.en: To assist companies with Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) compliance in the cloud, AWS provides:

A.zh: 预约对数据中心进行现场检查。
A.en: physical Inspections of data centers by appointment.

B.zh: 在 AWS 上运行的任何应用程序都需要 PCI 合规性认证。
B.en: required PCI compliance certifications for any application running on AWS.

C.zh: 针对特定 AWS 服务的 AWS 合规性证明 (AOC) 报告。
C.en: an AWS Attestation of Compliance (AOC) report for specific AWS services.

D.zh: 专业的 PCI 合规服务。
D.en: professional PCI compliance services.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 不允许客户对数据中心进行现场检查。 AWS数据中心的安全性由AWS管理，其合规性通过第三方审计进行验证。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS does not allow customers to conduct physical inspections of data centers. AWS data center security is managed by AWS and its compliance is verified through third-party audits.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 提供基础设施的合规性认证，但应用程序的 PCI DSS 合规性是客户的责任。 AWS 不直接为客户应用程序提供 PCI 认证。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS provides compliance certification of the infrastructure, but PCI DSS compliance of the application is the customer's responsibility. AWS does not directly provide PCI certification for customer applications.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 为特定符合范围的服务提供 PCI DSS 合规证明 (AOC)，客户可用该报告支持自身的合规评估。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS provides a PCI DSS Attestation of Compliance (AOC) for specific in-scope services, which customers can use in their own compliance assessments.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 并未直接提供专业的 PCI 合规性服务。客户可以使用 AWS 的合规性工具和文档来协助实现 PCI DSS 合规性，但特定的合规性服务通常由第三方提供。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS does not directly provide professional PCI compliance services. Customers can use AWS's compliance tools and documentation to help achieve PCI DSS compliance, but specific compliance services are typically provided by third parties.

answer_text.zh: C. 针对特定 AWS 服务的 AWS 合规性证明 (AOC) 报告。
answer_text.en: C. an AWS Attestation of Compliance (AOC) report for specific AWS services.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 为特定符合范围的服务提供 PCI DSS 合规证明 (AOC)，客户可用该报告支持自身的合规评估。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS provides a PCI DSS Attestation of Compliance (AOC) for specific in-scope services, which customers can use in their own compliance assessments.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 公司在哪些情况下应创建 IAM 用户而不是 IAM 角色？
question_text.en: In which situations should a company create an IAM user instead of an IAM role?

A.zh: 当在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的应用程序需要访问其他 AWS 服务时
A.en: When an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances requires access to other AWS services

B.zh: 当公司为个人创建 AWS 访问凭证时
B.en: When the company creates AWS access credentials for individuals

C.zh: 当公司创建在手机上运行并向 AWS 发出请求的应用程序时
C.en: When the company creates an application that runs on a mobile phone that makes requests to AWS

D.zh: 当公司需要将用户加入IAM群组时
D.en: When the company needs to add users to IAM groups

E.zh: 当用户在公司网络中经过验证并且希望无需再次登录即可使用 AWS 时
E.en: When users are authenticated in the corporate network and want to be able to use AWS without having to sign in a second time

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：对于在 EC2 实例上运行的应用程序，最佳实践是使用 IAM 角色而不是 IAM 用户。 IAM 角色可以附加到 EC2 实例，从而允许应用程序 D  安全地访问其他 AWS 服务，而无需管理长期凭证。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: For applications running on EC2 instances, the best practice is to use IAM roles instead of IAM users. IAM roles can be attached to EC2 instances, allowing Application D (50%) to securely access other AWS services without having to manage long-term credentials.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：IAM 用户是为个人创建访问凭证的正确选择。每个IAM用户都有唯一的访问密钥和密码，可以直接登录AWS管理控制台或通过API访问AWS服务。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: IAM users are the correct choice for creating access credentials for individuals. Each IAM user has a unique access key and password and can log in directly to the AWS management console or access AWS services through APIs.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：对于移动应用程序，Amazon Cognito 或 IAM 角色通常用于管理访问，而不是 IAM 用户。 IAM用户不适合直接应用访问授权。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: For mobile applications, Amazon Cognito or IAM roles are typically used to manage access, not IAM users. IAM users are not suitable for direct application access authorization.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：IAM 群组是用来管理多个 IAM 用户的权限集合。尽管可以将 IAM 用户添加至 IAM 群组，但这并不是创建 IAM 用户的主要原因。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: An IAM group is a collection of permissions used to manage multiple IAM users. Although IAM users can be added to IAM groups, this is not the main reason for creating IAM users.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：第二次 此场景通常使用 AWS Single Sign-On (SSO) 或联合身份验证，而不是创建 IAM 用户。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: second time This scenario typically uses AWS Single Sign-On (SSO) or federated authentication instead of creating an IAM user.

answer_text.zh: B. 当公司为个人创建 AWS 访问凭证时
answer_text.en: B. When the company creates AWS access credentials for individuals

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (67%) D (33%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：IAM 用户是为个人创建访问凭证的正确选择。每个IAM用户都有唯一的访问密钥和密码，可以直接登录AWS管理控制台或通过API访问AWS服务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (67%) D (33%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM users are the correct choice for creating access credentials for individuals. Each IAM user has a unique access key and password and can log in directly to the AWS management console or access AWS services through APIs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上托管一个 Web 应用程序。该公司通过配置多个 Amazon EC2 实例提高了其应用程序的可用性。该公司希望在 EC2 实例之间分配流量，同时为 Web 用户端提供单点联系。哪一种 AWS 服务可以将流量分配到作为目标的多个 EC2 实例？
question_text.en: A company hosts a web application on AWS. The company has improved the availability of its application by provisioning multiple Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants to distribute its traffic across the EC2 instances while providing a single point of contact to the web clients. Which AWS service can distribute the traffic to multiple EC2 instances as targets?

A.zh: VPC 终端节点
A.en: VPC endpoints

B.zh: 应用程序负载均衡器
B.en: Application Load Balancer

C.zh: NAT 网关
C.en: NAT gateway

D.zh: 互联网网关
D.en: Internet gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：VPC 终端节点用于与 VPC 内的 AWS 服务的私有连接，而不是用于将流量分配到多个 EC2 实例。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: VPC endpoints are used for private connections to AWS services within a VPC, not for distributing traffic to multiple EC2 instances.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Application Load Balancer 是 AWS 提供的负载平衡服务，可将流量分配到多个 EC2 实例，并向用户端提供单一访问点。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Application Load Balancer is a load balancing service provided by AWS that can distribute traffic to multiple EC2 instances and provide a single access point to the client.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：NAT 网关用于允许私有子网中的实例访问互联网，而不是将流量分发到多个 EC2 实例。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A NAT gateway is used to allow instances in a private subnet to access the internet, rather than to distribute traffic to multiple EC2 instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：公网网关用于VPC内的资源与公网通信，但不具备流量分送功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Internet gateway is used to allow resources in the VPC to communicate with the Internet, but it does not have the traffic distribution function.

answer_text.zh: B. 应用程序负载均衡器

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Application Load Balancer 是 AWS 提供的负载平衡服务，可将流量分配到多个 EC2 实例，并向用户端提供单一访问点。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Application Load Balancer is a load balancing service provided by AWS that can distribute traffic to multiple EC2 instances and provide a single access point to the client.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: Amazon S3 可以存储的总数据量是多少？
question_text.en: What is the total volume of data that can be stored in Amazon S3?

A.zh: 10 PB
A.en: 10 PB

B.zh: 50 PB
B.en: 50 PB

C.zh: 100 PB
C.en: 100 PB

D.zh: 几乎无限
D.en: Virtually unlimited

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 的总存储容量不限制为 10 PB，可存储远超该容量的数据。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The storage capacity of Amazon S3 is not specifically limited to 10 PB, and users can store data far exceeding the cup capacity.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 的总存储容量不限制为 50 PB，可存储更多数据。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Likewise, the storage capacity of Amazon S3 is not limited to 50 PB, and users can store more data.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 的总存储容量不限制为 100 PB，可存储更多数据。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The storage capacity of Amazon S3 is not limited to 100 PB, and users can store almost unlimited data.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon S3 提供几乎无限的总存储容量，客户可以根据需要存储数据。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: The storage capacity of Amazon S3 is "almost unlimited" and users can store as much data as they need.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon S3 提供几乎无限的总存储容量，客户可以根据需要存储数据。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The storage capacity of Amazon S3 is "almost unlimited" and users can store as much data as they need.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 根据 AWS Well-Architected Framework，哪一个设计原则与可靠度支柱相关？
question_text.en: Which design principle is related to the reliability pillar according to the AWS Well-Architected Framework?

A.zh: 测试恢复进程
A.en: Test recovery procedures

B.zh: 更频繁地进行实验
B.en: Experiment more often

C.zh: 几分钟内走向全球
C.en: Go global in minutes

D.zh: 分析并归因于支出
D.en: Analyze and attribute to expenditure

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：可靠性支柱强调系统在故障情况下的恢复能力，测试恢复过程是确保系统在故障后能够快速恢复的重要设计原则。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The reliability pillar emphasizes the system's ability to recover under fault conditions, and testing recovery procedures is an important design principle to ensure that the system can recover quickly after a fault.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项与创新支柱相关，而不是可靠性支柱。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is related to the Innovation pillar, not the Reliability pillar.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项与性能效率支柱相关，而不是可靠度支柱。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is related to the Performance Efficiency pillar, not the Reliability pillar.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项与成本优化支柱相关，而不是可靠性支柱。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is related to the Cost Optimization pillar, not the Reliability pillar.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：可靠性支柱强调系统在故障情况下的恢复能力，测试恢复过程是确保系统在故障后能够快速恢复的重要设计原则。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The reliability pillar emphasizes the system's ability to recover under fault conditions, and testing recovery procedures is an important design principle to ensure that the system can recover quickly after a fault.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司将数据存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。 AWS 负责哪一项任务？
question_text.en: A company stores data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Which task is the responsibility of AWS?

A.zh: 设置 S3 生命周期策略。
A.en: Configure an S3 Lifecycle policy.

B.zh: 启动 S3 版本控制。
B.en: Activate S3 Versioning.

C.zh: 设置 S3 存储桶策略。
C.en: Configure S3 bucket policies.

D.zh: 保护支持 S3 存储的基础设施。
D.en: Protect the infrastructure that supports S3 storage.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：设置 S3 生命周期策略是客户的责任，因为它会影响数据生命周期的管理和回传方式。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Configuring the S3 Lifecycle strategy is the customer's responsibility as it affects how the lifecycle of the data is managed and returned.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：启用 S3 版本控制是客户的责任，因为它是一项可选功能，客户需要根据自己的需求进行配置。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Enabling S3 Versioning is the customer's responsibility as it is an optional feature and customers need to configure it according to their needs.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：配置 S3 存储桶策略属于客户的访问控制责任，不是 AWS 对底层基础设施的责任。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Configuring an S3 bucket policy is the customer’s access-control responsibility, not AWS’s responsibility for the underlying infrastructure.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：保护支持 S3 存储的基础设施是 AWS 的责任，因为它是软件和底层基础设施安全管理的一部分，是 AWS 责任共担模式的一部分。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Securing the infrastructure supporting S3 storage is AWS's responsibility, as it is part of the security management of the software and underlying infrastructure as part of the AWS Shared Responsibility Model.

answer_text.zh: D. 保护支持 S3 存储的基础设施。
answer_text.en: D. Protect the infrastructure that supports S3 storage.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：来源未提供投票比例。热门讨论与考点摘要：保护支持 S3 存储的基础设施是 AWS 的责任，因为它是软件和底层基础设施安全管理的一部分，是 AWS 责任共担模式的一部分。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: the source did not provide vote percentages. Popular discussion and key point summary: Protecting the infrastructure that supports Amazon S3 is an AWS responsibility; customers configure lifecycle rules, versioning, and bucket policies.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望将目前在自己的数据中心运行的虚拟 Windows Server 2022 转移到 AWS。该公司希望自动将现有服务器转换为直接在 AWS 基础设施上运行，而不是在可视化硬件上运行。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to transfer a virtual Windows Server 2022 that is currently running in its own data center to AWS. The company wants to automatically convert the existing server to run directly on AWS infrastructure instead of visualized hardware. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS DataSync
A.en: AWS DataSync

B.zh: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)
B.en: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)

C.zh: AWS Application Discovery Service
C.en: AWS Application Discovery Service

D.zh: AWS Application Migration Service
D.en: AWS Application Migration Service

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS DataSync 主要用于数据迁移，协助用户将文件数据从本地存储或其他云存储迁移到 AWS 存储服务（例如 Amazon S3、Amazon EFS）。它不负责迁移虚拟服务器或转换服务器的运行环境。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS DataSync is mainly used for data migration, helping users migrate file data from local storage or other cloud storage to AWS storage services (such as Amazon S3, Amazon EFS). It is not responsible for migrating virtual servers or converting the server's operating environment.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS DMS 专注于数据库迁移，协助用户将数据库从本地或其他云迁移到 AWS 上的数据库服务（例如 Amazon RDS）。它不适合迁移虚拟服务器。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS DMS focuses on database migration, helping users migrate databases from local or other clouds to database services on AWS (such as Amazon RDS). It is not suitable for migrating virtual servers.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Application Discovery Service 用于发现和分析现有应用程序和服务器环境，以规划到 AWS 的迁移。它不负责实际的迁移或转换过程。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Application Discovery Service is used to discover and analyze existing application and server environments to plan for migration to AWS. It is not responsible for the actual migration or conversion process.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Application Migration Service 是一项专门用于将现有服务器迁移到 AWS 的服务。它可以自动将本地或虚拟化服务器转换为在AWS基础设施上运行的实例，以满足问题要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Application Migration Service is a service specifically designed for migrating existing servers to AWS. It can automatically convert local or virtualized servers into instances running on AWS infrastructure to meet the question requirements.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Application Migration Service 是一项专门用于将现有服务器迁移到 AWS 的服务。它可以自动将本地或虚拟化服务器转换为在AWS基础设施上运行的实例，以满足问题要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Application Migration Service is a service specifically designed for migrating existing servers to AWS. It can automatically convert local or virtualized servers into instances running on AWS infrastructure to meet the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一项 AWS 服务是完全托管的 NoSQL 数据库服务？
question_text.en: Which AWS service is a fully managed NoSQL database service?

A.zh: Amazon RDS
A.en: Amazon RDS

B.zh: Amazon Redshift
B.en: Amazon Redshift

C.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
C.en: Amazon DynamoDB

D.zh: Amazon Aurora
D.en: Amazon Aurora

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon RDS 是一种托管关系数据库服务，支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、MariaDB、Oracle 和 SQL Server 等 SQL 数据库。它不是NoSQL数据库服务，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a managed relational database service that supports SQL databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, Oracle, and SQL Server. It is not a NoSQL database service, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Redshift 是一种托管数据仓库服务，主要用于分析和处理结构化数据。它也不是 NoSQL 数据库服务，因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a managed data warehouse service primarily used for analyzing and processing structured data. It is also not a NoSQL database service, so this option is.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一项完全托管的 NoSQL 数据库服务，支持键值和文档存储，非常适合需要低延迟和高吞吐量的应用程序。因此该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a fully managed NoSQL database service that supports key-value and document stores, making it ideal for applications that require low latency and high throughput. Therefore this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是兼容于 MySQL 和 PostgreSQL 的关系数据库服务。它不是NoSQL数据库服务，因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a relational database service compatible with MySQL and PostgreSQL. It is not a NoSQL database service, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：来源未提供投票比例。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon DynamoDB 是一项完全托管的 NoSQL 数据库服务，支持键值和文档存储，非常适合需要低延迟和高吞吐量的应用程序。因此该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: the source did not provide vote percentages. Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon DynamoDB is a fully managed NoSQL database service that provides low-latency key-value and document access without database server administration.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在全球多个 AWS 区域部署了一个应用程序。该公司希望提高应用程序的性能和可用性。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company deployed an application in multiple AWS Regions around the world. The company wants to improve the application’s performance and availability. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Global Accelerator
A.en: AWS Global Accelerator

B.zh: Amazon DataZone
B.en: Amazon DataZone

C.zh: AWS Cloud Map
C.en: AWS Cloud Map

D.zh: AWS Auto Scaling
D.en: AWS Auto Scaling

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Global Accelerator 是一项网络服务，可通过优化流量路径来提高应用程序性能和可用性。它使用全球任播 IP 地址将用户流量路由到最近的 AWS 区域，从而减少延迟并提高可靠性。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Global Accelerator is a network service that improves application performance and availability by optimizing traffic paths. It uses global Anycast IP addresses to route user traffic to the nearest AWS Region, reducing latency and increasing reliability.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DataZone 是一项数据管理服务，主要用于数据发现、共享和管理，与提高应用程序性能和可用性无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon DataZone is a data management service that is primarily used for data discovery, sharing, and management, and has nothing to do with improving application performance and availability.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Cloud Map 是一种服务开发工具，用于注册应用程序资源并使应用程序能够动态开发资源，但它不会直接提高应用程序性能和可用性。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Cloud Map is a service development tool that is used to register application resources and enable applications to dynamically develop resources, but it does not directly improve application performance and availability.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Auto Scaling 主要用于根据需求自动调整资源的大小。虽然可以间接提高可用性，但并不影响全域范围内的性能优化。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Auto Scaling is mainly used to automatically adjust the size of resources according to demand. Although it can indirectly improve availability, it does not affect performance optimization on a global scale.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Global Accelerator 是一项网络服务，可通过优化流量路径来提高应用程序性能和可用性。它使用全球任播 IP 地址将用户流量路由到最近的 AWS 区域，从而减少延迟并提高可靠性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Global Accelerator is a network service that improves application performance and availability by optimizing traffic paths. It uses global Anycast IP addresses to route user traffic to the nearest AWS Region, reducing latency and increasing reliability.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望将其本地 SQL Server 数据库迁移到 AWS 云。该公司希望 AWS 处理数据库的日常管理。哪种AWS服务可以满足公司的要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate its on-premises SQL Server database to the AWS Cloud. The company wants AWS to handle the day- to-day administration of the database. Which AWS service will meet the company's requirements?

A.zh: 适用于 Microsoft SQL Server 的 Amazon EC2
A.en: Amazon EC2 for Microsoft SQL Server

B.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
B.en: Amazon DynamoDB

C.zh: Amazon RDS
C.en: Amazon RDS

D.zh: Amazon Aurora
D.en: Amazon Aurora

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然Microsoft SQL Server可以在Amazon EC2上运行，但EC2只是一个虚拟服务器，用户需要自行管理操作系统和数据库软件的安装、设置、备份和维护。不符合「让AWS来处理日常管理」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Microsoft SQL Server can be run on Amazon EC2, EC2 is just a virtual server, and users need to manage the installation, configuration, backup, and maintenance of the operating system and database software by themselves. It doesn't meet the requirement of "let AWS handle day-to-day management".

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一种 NoSQL 数据库服务，适合键值和文档存储，而不是关系数据库（例如 SQL Server）。它不支持 SQL Server 数据库的迁移。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon DynamoDB is a NoSQL database service suitable for key-value and document storage, rather than relational databases (such as SQL Server). It does not support migration of SQL Server databases.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon RDS（关系数据库服务）支持 Microsoft SQL Server 并提供托管服务，包括自动备份、软件更新、监控和维护。这完全符合「让AWS处理日常管理」的要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon RDS (Relational Database Service) supports Microsoft SQL Server and provides managed services including automated backups, software updates, monitoring, and maintenance. This fits perfectly with the "let AWS handle day-to-day management" requirement.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是一种高性能关系数据库服务，但它与 SQL Server 不兼容。 Aurora 支持 MySQL 和 PostgreSQL，但不支持 SQL Server。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Aurora is a high-performance relational database service, but it is not compatible with SQL Server. Aurora supports MySQL and PostgreSQL, not SQL Server.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon RDS（关系数据库服务）支持 Microsoft SQL Server 并提供托管服务，包括自动备份、软件更新、监控和维护。这完全符合「让AWS处理日常管理」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon RDS (Relational Database Service) supports Microsoft SQL Server and provides managed services including automated backups, software updates, monitoring, and maintenance. This fits perfectly with the "let AWS handle day-to-day management" requirement.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要为其 VPC 进行无状态网络过滤。哪些 AWS 服务、工具或功能可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company needs stateless network filtering for its VPC. Which AWS service, tool, or feature will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS PrivateLink
A.en: AWS PrivateLink

B.zh: 安全群组
B.en: Security group

C.zh: 网络访问控制清单 (ACL)
C.en: Network access control list (ACL)

D.zh: AWS WAF
D.en: AWS WAF

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS PrivateLink 用于通过私有连接而非公用 Internet 安全地访问服务（例如 SaaS 内部服务）。它不提供网络过滤功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS PrivateLink is used to securely access services (such as SaaS internal services) over a private connection rather than the public Internet. It does not provide network filtering capabilities.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全群组是一种无状态的网络过滤机制，适合实例层级的流量控制，题目要求「无状态网络过滤」。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Security group is a stateless network filtering mechanism, suitable for instance-level traffic control, and the question requires "Stateless network filtering".

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：网络ACL 是一种无状态的网络过滤机制，适用于子网层级的流量控制，满足问题中「无状态网络过滤」的要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Network ACL is a stateless network filtering mechanism, suitable for subnet-level traffic control, and meets the "Stateless network filtering" requirement of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS WAF 是一种 Web 用户防火墙，用于保护 Web 用户免受常见攻击（例如 SQL 注入、跨站脚本攻击），而不是用于 VPC 的网络过滤。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS WAF is a web user firewall used to protect web users from common attacks (such as SQL injection, cross-site scripting attacks), not for network filtering of VPCs.

answer_text.zh: C. 网络访问控制清单 (ACL)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：网络ACL 是一种无状态的网络过滤机制，适用于子网层级的流量控制，满足问题中「无状态网络过滤」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Network ACL is a stateless network filtering mechanism, suitable for subnet-level traffic control, and meets the "Stateless network filtering" requirement of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 哪个选项是 AWS 云计算最大程度降低变动成本的优点？
question_text.en: Which option is an advantage of AWS Cloud computing that minimizes variable costs?

A.zh: 高可用性
A.en: High availability

B.zh: 规模经济
B.en: Economies of scale

C.zh: 全球影响力
C.en: Global reach

D.zh: 敏捷
D.en: Agility

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：高可用性 是AWS的一个重要特性，但它与降低变动成本没有直接关系，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an important feature of AWS, but it is not directly related to reducing variable costs, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：规模经济 是AWS云计算的核心优势之一。通过共享资源和大规模运营，AWS可以以更低的成本提供服务，从而帮助用户降低变动成本。该选项符合题目要求。

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望将其基于服务器的应用程序迁移到 AWS 云。该公司希望确定将托管在 AWS 云上的计算资源的总拥有成本。哪种 AWS 服务或工具组合可以满足这些要求？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate its server-based applications to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to determine the total cost of ownership for its compute resources that will be hosted on the AWS Cloud. Which combination of AWS services or tools will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: AWS Pricing Calculator
A.en: AWS Pricing Calculator

B.zh: 迁移评估器
B.en: Migration Evaluator

C.zh: AWS 支持中心
C.en: AWS Support Center

D.zh: AWS Application Discovery Service
D.en: AWS Application Discovery Service

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Pricing Calculator 是用来估算在 AWS 上运行服务的成本的工具。它可以帮助企业计算总拥有成本（TCO）并满足问题的要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The AWS Pricing Calculator is a tool for estimating the cost of running services on AWS. It can help companies calculate total cost of ownership (TCO) and meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Migration Evaluator（以前称为 TSO Logic）是一种用于分析现有服务器环境并提供迁移到 AWS 的成本估算的工具。这直接满足了问题中迁移和TCO的需求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Migration Evaluator (formerly TSO Logic) is a tool for analyzing existing server environments and providing cost estimates for migrating to AWS. This directly meets the needs of migration and TCO in the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 支持中心是一个支持门户，用于管理支持请求和查看账户信息。它不提供成本估算或迁移分析功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Support Center is a support portal used to manage support requests and view account information. It does not provide cost estimation or migration analysis capabilities.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Application Discovery Service 用于收集服务器使用和性能数据以协助规划迁移，但它不会直接提供 TCO 计算功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Application Discovery Service is used to collect server usage and performance data to help plan migrations, but it does not directly provide TCO calculation capabilities.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS DMS 是一种用于将数据库迁移到 AWS 的迁移工具。虽然它与迁移相关，但不涉及成本估算或 TCO 分析。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS DMS is a migration tool used to migrate databases to AWS. While it is related to migration, it does not involve cost estimation or TCO analysis.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS Pricing Calculator；B. 迁移评估器
answer_text.en: A. AWS Pricing Calculator; B. Migration Evaluator

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AB (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Pricing Calculator 是用来估算在 AWS 上运行服务的成本的工具。它可以帮助企业计算总拥有成本（TCO）并满足问题的要求。；Migration Evaluator（以前称为 TSO Logic）是一种用于分析现有服务器环境并提供迁移到 AWS 的成本估算的工具。这直接满足了问题中迁移和TCO的需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AB (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The AWS Pricing Calculator is a tool for estimating the cost of running services on AWS. It can help companies calculate total cost of ownership (TCO) and meet the requirements of the question.; This option is described as follows: Migration Evaluator (formerly TSO Logic) is a tool for analyzing existing server environments and providing cost estimates for migrating to AWS. This directly meets the needs of migration and TCO in the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司拥有专为高性能计算 (HPC) 工作负载设计的数据湖。公司应使用哪种 Amazon EC2 实例类型来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has data lakes designed for high performance computing (HPC) workloads. Which Amazon EC2 instance type should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 通用实例
A.en: General purpose instances

B.zh: 计算优化实例
B.en: Compute optimized instances

C.zh: 内存优化实例
C.en: Memory optimized instances

D.zh: 存储优化实例
D.en: Storage optimized instances

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：通用实例适用于平衡计算、内存和网络资源的工作负载，但不是专门为高性能计算 (HPC) 工作负载设计的，因此不适合此场景。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: General-purpose instances are suitable for workloads that balance compute, memory, and network resources, but are not specifically designed for high-performance computing (HPC) workloads and are therefore not suitable for this scenario. D (33%).

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：计算优化实例专为需要高性能处理能力的工作负载而设计，例如高性能计算 (HPC)、科学建模和机器学习。这是满足问题要求的最佳因此符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Compute-optimized instances are designed specifically for workloads that require high-performance processing capabilities, such as high-performance computing (HPC), scientific modeling, and machine learning. This is the best option to meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：内存优化实例适用于需要大量内存的工作负载，例如内存密集型数据库或实时大数据分析，但不适合主要依赖计算性能的 HPC 工作负载。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Memory-optimized instances are suitable for workloads that require large amounts of memory, such as memory-intensive databases or real-time big data analytics, but are not suitable for HPC workloads that rely primarily on computing performance.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：存储优化型实例适用于需要高吞吐量或低延迟存储的工作负载，例如大规模数据处理或日志分析，但与高性能计算 (HPC) 没有直接关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Storage-optimized instances are suitable for workloads that require high throughput or low-latency storage, such as large-scale data processing or log analysis, but are not directly related to high-performance computing (HPC).

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (82%) D (18%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：计算优化实例专为需要高性能处理能力的工作负载而设计，例如高性能计算 (HPC)、科学建模和机器学习。这是满足问题要求的最佳因此符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (82%) D (18%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Compute-optimized instances are designed specifically for workloads that require high-performance processing capabilities, such as high-performance computing (HPC), scientific modeling, and machine learning. This is the best option to meet the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 当公司从本地 IT 架构迁移到 AWS 云时，公司可以获得哪些好处？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which benefits does a company gain when the company moves from on-premises IT architecture to the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 减少或消除硬件故障排除、容量规划和采购任务
A.en: Reduced or eliminated tasks for hardware troubleshooting, capacity planning, and procurement

B.zh: 无需受过训练的 IT 人员
B.en: Elimination of the need for trained IT staff

C.zh: 所有迁移到云的应用程序的自动安全性配置
C.en: Automatic security configuration of all applications that are migrated to the cloud

D.zh: 消除灾难恢复规划的需要
D.en: Elimination of the need for disaster recovery planning

E.zh: 更快地部署新功能和应用程序
E.en: Faster deployment of new features and applications

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 托管底层硬件并提供按需容量，可减少硬件故障排除、容量规划和采购工作。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS manages the underlying hardware and provides on-demand capacity, reducing hardware troubleshooting, capacity planning, and procurement work.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 AWS 不会消除对具备云架构、安全和运营技能人员的需求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using AWS does not eliminate the need for personnel with cloud architecture, security, and operations skills.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 提供安全服务，但客户仍须正确配置迁移后的应用程序、身份、网络和数据保护控制。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS provides security services, but customers must still configure application, identity, network, and data-protection controls correctly.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：迁移到 AWS 不会消除灾难恢复规划；客户仍须根据恢复目标设计和测试恢复策略。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Moving to AWS does not eliminate disaster recovery planning; customers must design and test recovery strategies against their recovery objectives.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 允许按需快速配置基础设施，减少购买和安装硬件的等待时间，以便企业可以更快地部署新功能和应用程序。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS allows for rapid provisioning of infrastructure on demand, reducing the wait time to purchase and install hardware, so businesses can deploy new features and applications faster.

answer_text.zh: A. 减少或消除硬件故障排除、容量规划和采购任务；E. 更快地部署新功能和应用程序
answer_text.en: A. Reduced or eliminated tasks for hardware troubleshooting, capacity planning, and procurement; E. Faster deployment of new features and applications

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：来源未提供投票比例。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 托管底层硬件并提供按需容量，可减少硬件故障排除、容量规划和采购工作。；AWS 允许按需快速配置基础设施，减少购买和安装硬件的等待时间，以便企业可以更快地部署新功能和应用程序。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: the source did not provide vote percentages. Popular discussion and key point summary: Moving to AWS reduces hardware troubleshooting, capacity planning, and procurement work, while on-demand provisioning accelerates deployment of new features and applications.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正计划迁移到 AWS 云。该公司正在进行组织转型，希望能够更积极地响应客户的询问和反馈。根据 AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)，公司应该运行哪些任务来满足这些要求？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company is conducting organizational transformation and wants to become more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback. Which task should the company perform to meet these requirements, according to the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 重新调整团队以专注于产品和价值流。
A.en: Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.

B.zh: 通过新产品和服务创造新的价值主张。
B.en: Create new value propositions with new products and services.

C.zh: 使用敏捷方法快速迭代和发展。
C.en: Use agile methods to rapidly iterate and evolve.

D.zh: 使用新的数据和分析平台来创建可行的见解。
D.en: Use a new data and analytics platform to create actionable insights.

E.zh: 迁移遗留基础设施并使其现代化。

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS CAF 建议组织在迁移过程中重组其团队，以专注于产品和价值流，以提高响应客户需求的能力。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS CAF recommends that organizations restructure their teams during the migration process to focus on products and value streams to improve their ability to respond to customer needs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然创造新的价值主张是业务创新的一部分，但它并不是与提高对客户需求的响应能力直接相关的任务。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While creating new value propositions is part of business innovation, it is not a task directly related to improving responsiveness to customer needs.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：使用敏捷广场可以帮助组织快速响应客户反馈并持续改进产品和服务，这是 AWS CAF 中推荐的做法。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Using agile squares can help organizations respond quickly to customer feedback and continuously improve products and services, which is a recommended practice in AWS CAF.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然数据分析平台可以帮助组织做出更好的决策，但它与组织转型和提高客户响应能力的核心使命没有直接关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While a data analytics platform can help organizations make better decisions, it is not directly related to the core mission of transforming an organization and improving customer responsiveness.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：遗留基础设施的迁移和现代化是技术转型的一部分，但它与提高客户响应能力的组织转型使命没有直接关系。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Migrating and modernizing legacy infrastructure is part of technology transformation, but it is not directly related to the organizational transformation mission of improving customer responsiveness.

answer_text.zh: A. 重新调整团队以专注于产品和价值流。；C. 使用敏捷方法快速迭代和发展。
answer_text.en: A. Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.; C. Use agile methods to rapidly iterate and evolve.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AC (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS CAF 建议组织在迁移过程中重组其团队，以专注于产品和价值流，以提高响应客户需求的能力。；使用敏捷广场可以帮助组织快速响应客户反馈并持续改进产品和服务，这是 AWS CAF 中推荐的做法。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS CAF recommends that organizations restructure their teams during the migration process to focus on products and value streams to improve their ability to respond to customer needs.; Using agile squares can help organizations respond quickly to customer feedback and continuously improve products and services, which is a recommended practice in AWS CAF.
